title: Bang Bang Chicken Bahn Mi
ingredients_html:
Sandwich

  • 12 oz chicken breast, cubed
  • 4 ciabatta rolls

Bang Bang Sauce

  • 4 TBSP mayonnaise
  • 1 TBSP sriracha
  • Sweet & sour sauce
  • 1 TBSP paprika
  • 1 TBSP garlic powder
  • 1 TBSP onion powder
  • 1 TBSP salt

Pickled Daikons and Carrots

  • carrots, sliced
  • daikons, sliced
  • 1 part white vinegar
  • 1 part water
  • 1/2 cup sugar
steps_html:
1. In a bowl, add carrots, daikons, vinegar, water, and sugar. Mix and let sit for at least 1 hour.
  2. In a small bowl, add mayo, sriracha, sweet & sour sauce, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, and salt, mix well. Set a little bit to the side for topping.
  3. Mix cubed chicken in with the bang bang sauce, then skewer them. Airfry at 385°F for about 12 minutes, flipping halfway through, or until cooked. Coat with remaining sauce
  4. Assemble chicken and pickled daikons and carrots on the sandwich.
